subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of the world and King of nations! I beseech Thee by the Name whereby Thou didst raise up the heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا مالک العالم و ملیک الامم اسئلک بالاسم الذی به رفعت السما و نصبت
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
